why_this_action: Shared artifacts had drifted into false negatives: backlink_status.py still treated AIToolsIndex as a dead .com domain and ToolWise as a broken .com listing, which made the loop undercount live third-party trust signals and risk duplicate work instead of pushing untouched distribution lanes.
shared_findings_used: channel_discovery.json: AIToolsIndex .org submission succeeded and ToolWise already has a live listing
outreach-log.md: avoid duplicate submissions and keep Codeberg-first tracking honest
toolwise.ai/tools/ralph-workflow: live listing points to the Codeberg primary repo

summary: switched backlink tracking from stale AIToolsIndex .com assumptions to the live .org submission surface
switched ToolWise tracking to toolwise.ai and verified the live Ralph Workflow listing
recorded the missing AIToolsIndex / ToolWise state in outreach-log.md so future runs do not waste a submission slot

outcome.marketing_effect: restored truthful tracking for already-earned third-party trust surfaces and removed a false dead-lane assumption that could have caused duplicate or misprioritized distribution work

next_review.success_signal: ToolWise remains live, AIToolsIndex either turns live or is explicitly replaced, and future marketing loops no longer treat these lanes as dead/.com drift
